claim: NLP has evolved from rule-based systems to probabilistic systems to machine learning to end-to-end deep learning that captures more complicated patterns
actionable: Understand the progression of NLP techniques when building modern systems; leverage deep learning and attention rather than hand-engineered features
source_title: Natural Language Processing Specialization by DeepLearning.AI

claim: Attention models have dramatically reduced training time from weeks/months to hours, enabling practical deployment of sequence-to-sequence systems
actionable: Use attention-based architectures in NLP systems for both computational efficiency and improved model quality
source_title: Natural Language Processing Specialization by DeepLearning.AI

claim: Modern NLP systems built with attention and parallel computing enable state-of-the-art machine translation, summarization, question answering, and chatbots
actionable: Leverage attention mechanisms and parallel computing when building production NLP systems for improved quality and speed
source_title: Natural Language Processing Specialization by DeepLearning.AI

claim: NLP models can automate call center operations and help businesses make sense of large volumes of unstructured text data at scale
actionable: Consider NLP automation for high-volume, routine text processing tasks like customer service routing and data analysis
source_title: Natural Language Processing Specialization by DeepLearning.AI
